title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Puravankara

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Puravankara
jsonLd.description:
Puravankara has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Puravankara:
Puravankara is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puravankara!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
